title: 2. Add a 2nd point – Ling gu and Da bai for instance. This is a neighboring poin
text:
If you choose a different meridian, this is not Dao Ma! Dao Ma enhances the treatment if you choose a
point on the same meridian.
Note that while Ling gu and Da bai go together often, be sure of what you want to do and needle the
primary application point first! In the case of 3 point combinations, needle the middle first, then the
surrounding points.
